items.name: tacos
items.simplified_description: Tacos available for $3 each with 6-pack Sol beer for $18.

items.name: Chicken & Pancakes
items.description: Fluffy pancakes, crispy bacon, buttermilk fried chicken, maple sauce and Chile butter with a sunny up egg ☀️
items.simplified_description: Pancakes with fried chicken, bacon, maple sauce, chile butter, and a sunny side egg.

items.name: Blue Star Blend
items.description: We proudly serve our very own delicious Blue Star Blend, roasted by the great people at @fratellocoffeeroasters, right here in Calgary! 💙 Now available on the Blue Star Takeout menu!
items.simplified_description: House blend coffee roasted locally in Calgary.

items.name: Chicken wings
items.description: Chicken wings are $10/ lb and White Claw is $18/ 6 pack. Every Wednesday🧨
items.simplified_description: Chicken wings priced at $10 per pound.

items.name: Journey Bowl
items.description: Brown Rice, Kale, Thai curry sauce, ginger vinaigrette, 🥕, beets,
items.simplified_description: Brown rice bowl with kale, Thai curry sauce, ginger vinaigrette, and beets.

items.name: Calgary beers & ciders, wines and Whiteclaws
items.description: Blue Star Takeout is running happy hour alllllll night! Calgary beers & ciders, wines and Whiteclaws! 🍾 Hit the link in our bio to order for pickup! 💙
items.simplified_description: Happy hour all night on local beers, ciders, wines, and Whiteclaws.
